title: christophoriana vesicatoria
side_effects: Christophoriana vesicatoria can have side effects if used improperly, such as excessive blistering and skin irritation, due to its high concentration of saponins and glycosides. Prolonged use or incorrect dosage can lead to allergic reactions, including anaphylaxis, and may cause liver or kidney damage in rare cases. Additionally, topical application of the plant's extract can cause skin burns, especially in individuals with sensitive skin or open wounds. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using Christophoriana vesicatoria for medicinal purposes to avoid these potential side effects.
